+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "netdata-5897-collect-mongodb-sharding-metrics",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "netdata: Collect MongoDB sharding metrics",
+    "description": "Collect MongoDB sharding metrics. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current netdata setup",
+        "description": "Verify your netdata version and configuration:\n```bash\nnetdata -v\n```\nThis feature requires a working netdata installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review netdata configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant netdata configuration:\nHi all, I am comparing netdata module for MongoDB and [mongo exporter for prometheus](https://github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/blob/master/README.md)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Collect MongoDB sharding metrics",
+        "description": "Ok, i did some research, i read [percona](https://www.percona.com/) [mongodb exporter](https://github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter) code\n\nThe source is trustable\n\n#### how it works:\n - detects node type\n - [collects metrics based on node\n```yaml\n[ilyam@pc collector]$ grep \"commoncollector\" -R mongos/* mongod/* mongodb_collector.go \nmongos/server_status.go:\tcommoncollector \"github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/collector/common\"\nmongos/server_status.go:\tcommoncollector.ServerStatus `bson:\",inline\"`\nmongod/server_status.go:\tcommoncollector \"github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/collector/common\"\nmongod/server_status.go:\tcommoncollector.ServerStatus `bson:\",inline\"`\nmongodb_collector.go:\tcommoncollector \"github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/collector/common\"\nmongodb_collector.go:\t\tconnPoolStats := commoncollector.GetConnPoolStats(client)\nmong\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Collect MongoDB sharding metrics\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Ok, i did some research, i read [percona](https://www.percona.com/) [mongodb exporter](https://github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter) code\n\nThe source is trustable\n\n#### how it works:\n - detects node type\n - [collects metrics based on node type](https://github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/blob/1f6c288104a069ad57811c7552f4d4b451f9567b/collector/mongodb_collector.go#L227-L237)\n\n#### Node types:\n -",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[ilyam@pc collector]$ grep \"commoncollector\" -R mongos/* mongod/* mongodb_collector.go \nmongos/server_status.go:\tcommoncollector \"github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/collector/common\"\nmongos/server_status.go:\tcommoncollector.ServerStatus `bson:\",inline\"`\nmongod/server_status.go:\tcommoncollector \"github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/collector/common\"\nmongod/server_status.go:\tcommoncollector.ServerStatus `bson:\",inline\"`\nmongodb_collector.go:\tcommoncollector \"github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/collector/common\"\nmongodb_collector.go:\t\tconnPoolStats := commoncollector.GetConnPoolStats(client)\nmongodb_collector.go:\t\tconnPoolStats := commoncollector.GetConnPoolStats(client"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "netdata",
+      "community",
+      "monitoring",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "netdata"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/netdata/netdata/issues/5897",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/netdata/netdata"
+    },
+    "reactions": 9,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "netdata"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working netdata installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T07:03:13.614Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
